rulings.Case Title: TAMBURO VS LIPARI
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION Notice Of Motion Confirmation Of Partition Accounting & Appaisal & Rendering Of A Final Decision On Pltf'S Motion For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT GRANTED, BUT STAYED. FILING OF LAWSUIT TOLLS PERIOD FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLY WITH BUY IN PROVISION. HOWEVER COURT GRANTS DEFENDANT 54 DAYS WITHIN WHICH TO TENDER 25% OF THE VALUE OF PLAINTIFF'S EQUITY INTEREST AND OTHERWISE COMPLY WITH HOME PURCHASE AGREEMENT. IF NO TENDER COURT WILL ENTER ADJUDICATION FOR PARTITION. MOTION TO CONFIRM ACCOUNTING TO BE HEARD BY TRIAL JUDGE. (CW)
